title: Stornoway Airport Commemorates Iolaire Tragedy with Charity Event

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Stornoway Airport hosted a charity event on 10 January to honour the local community and remember the Iolaire tragedy. The event offered attendees a chance for quiet reflection on the anniversary of the maritime disaster, which claimed the lives of many local men returning home after World War I.

Such commemorative events highlight the strong connection between aviation and community in the Highlands and Islands, where aviation has played a vital role since the inter-war period.

sourceReferences.citationText: hial-airports – Stornoway Airport hosts charity event in remembrance of the Iolaire
